title: In-Memory Todo API with Hexagonal Architecture

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in src/main.rs — single-binary rust project

Feature requirements: build a todo REST API in Rust with axum: POST /todos to create, GET /todos to list, DELETE /todos/:id to remove. In-memory storage, JSON responses.
steps.done_condition: src/main.rs compiles and fully implements: build a todo REST API in Rust with axum: POST /todos to create, GET /todos to list, DELETE /todos/:id to remove. In-memory storage, JSON responses.; Cargo.toml has correct dependencies

riskRegister.mitigation: Document in README.md and add warning in API responses
Regular Vec cleanup during DELETE operations

successCriteria: POST /todos creates new todo with 201 Created response
GET /todos returns 200 OK with JSON array of todos
